AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md (descriptive pattern, not a commitment) with explicit rationale tying the 'mixed' marker to methodology.md#provenance-markers; also explicitly declined to write to decisions.md because the pattern has not earned commitment status — matches the strict bar.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: Notes use relative paths (methodology.md#provenance-markers, decisions.md) which resolve, but no cross-reference is embedded in the observation entry itself — future readers of the file alone won't see the provenance methodology link.

AR4.justification: Single append below the newest-at-bottom marker under an ISO-dated header; re-run would add a new entry, not mutate; no in-place rewrites.
